expo.name: CONVOY
expo.description: Real-time group navigation and push-to-talk for car enthusiasts. Drive together.

infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: CONVOY uses your location to keep your convoy in sync and find nearby groups.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: CONVOY uses background location to update your position in the convoy.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: CONVOY needs microphone access for push-to-talk radio between convoy members.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: CONVOY uses your camera for profile and vehicle photos.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: CONVOY uses background location to update your position in the convoy.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: CONVOY uses your location to keep your convoy in sync and find nearby groups.
